text:
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/py36-pandas-0.21.1.txz
Installing py36-pandas-0.21.1...
`-- Installing py36-bottleneck-1.2.1...
pkg-static: py36-bottleneck-1.2.1 conflicts with py27-bottleneck-1.2.1 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/share/doc/py-bottleneck/README.rst

We can fix it by changing DOCSDIR from py-bottleneck to py27-bottleneck and py36-bottleneck.
